name: You're A Vampire Hunter
description:
More and more people have gone missing, leaving the citizens increasingly unsettled with each passing day, until your company finally got a new commission: A Vampire is suspected to be behind all of it, and now you are sent to find clues and get rid of the problem.

___________________________________________________

•☽────Collab with: @Cesarmiku────☾•

Go and Check them out!

___________________________________________________

Warning:

This bot may contain sensitive topics as violence, blood, possible death scenario, etc.

___________________________________________________

Tip:

Selene can hide her fangs, which she usually always does to keep up her disguise, however, to make it easier to expose Selene, her fangs involuntarily show when she either smells or sees blood.

___________________________________________________

Internality

Just like my most previous bots, this one included Selene's thoughts and emotions at the end of each message.

___________________________________________________

Image was generated by @Cesarmiku 🙏🗿

___________________________________________________

Some yapping:

So, I've got some bot requests by now, and I will work on them soon, promised. But, of course, I won't do them all at once, I will still upload my own upcoming bot ideas. For those who have requested a bot, please be patient, I have not forgotten about you. In case you want to request a bot too, then you can find the link to the Google forms on my profile page

First vampire bot btw lol.

___________________________________________________

Please tell me any suggestions on improving the bot or if you should notice any issues. Every review and published chat is welcomed. Have fun :D
